description: A vulnerability was identified in code-projects Online Complaint Site 1.0. This vulnerability affects unknown code of the file /cms/users/index.php. Such manipulation of the argument Username leads to sql injection. The attack may be performed from remote. The exploit is publicly available and might be used.
